fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you shipped the items on the credit memo to.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posted credit memo number.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the credit memo was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that you send or sent the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the credit memo was sent to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference. The contents will be printed on sales documents.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items were shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Ship-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the credit memo was posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip:
Copies the date for this field from the Shipment Date field on the sales header, which is used for planning purposes.
You cannot change the shipment date because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies any text that is entered to accompany the posting, for example for information to auditors.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code to use to find the payment terms that apply to the credit memo.
The program copies the payment terms code from the Payment Terms Code on the sales header.
The payment terms are used to calculate the due date and payment discount date from the posting date, and to find the payment discount percentage.
You cannot change the payment terms code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the shipment is due for payment.

fields.name: Payment Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the payment discount percentage granted if payment is made by the date entered in the Pmt. Discount Date field.
The program copies the payment discount percentage from the Payment Discount % field on the sales header.
You cannot change the payment discount percentage because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Pmt. Discount Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date on which the credit memo must be paid to obtain a payment discount.
The program copies the payment discount date from the Pmt. Discount Date field on the sales header.
Once orders, invoices and shipments have been posted, the payment discount date is used to calculate payment discounts on payments from customers.
You cannot change the payment discount date because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipment method for the shipment.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location where the credit memo was registered.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's market type to link business transactions to.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the credit memo.

fields.name: Currency Factor
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group used on the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Customer Price Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer price group because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Prices Including VAT
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the sales prices on the credit memo lines include VAT.
The program copies the information from the Prices Including VAT field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Invoice Disc. Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the credit memo's invoice discount.
The program copies the invoice discount code from the Invoice Disc. Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the invoice discount code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code used to calculate the customer's sales line discount.
The program copies the code from the Customer Disc. Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the customer discount group because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Language Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a code for the language used on the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Language Code field on the sales header.
The language code made it possible for the items on the sales line to be written in the customer's language.
You cannot change the language code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which salesperson is associated with the credit memo.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether a comment has been entered for this sales credit memo header.
You can also enter a comment in Notes FactBox.

fields.name: No. Printed
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many times the document has been printed.

fields.name: On Hold
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the credit memo was marked as on hold when it was posted.
The program copies the information from the On Hold field on the sales header.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Applies-to Doc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the posted document that this document or journal line will be applied to when you post, for example to register payment.

fields.name: Bal. Account No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a general ledger account number to which a balancing entry for the credit memo was posted.
The program copies the number from the Bal. Account No. field on the sales header.
You cannot change the balancing account because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts on all the credit memo lines, in the currency of the credit memo. The amount does not include VAT.

fields.name: Amount Including VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total of the amounts, including VAT, on all the lines on the document.

fields.name: VAT Registration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's VAT registration number for customers.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reason code that is associated with the credit memo.
The program copies the reason code from the Reason Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the reason code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the general business posting group code that is assigned to the customer that you sent the credit memo to.
The program copies the code from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: EU 3-Party Trade
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice was part of an EU 3-party trade transaction.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type of the sales header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transaction type from the Transaction Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the transaction type because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method of the sales header that this line was posted from.
The program copies the transport method from the Transport Method field on the sales header.
You cannot change the transport method because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip:
Shows the customer's VAT country/region code.
The program copies the VAT country/region code from the VAT Country/Region Code field on the sales header.
You cannot change the VAT country/region code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of customer at the sell-to address.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the name of the customer who will receive the products and be billed by default.

fields.name: Sell-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer that the items on the credit memo were sent to.

fields.name: Sell-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Sell-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the customer on the sales document.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person to contact when you communicate with the customer who you shipped the items on the credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Bill-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Sell-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Sell-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Sell-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the customer's main address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: Ship-to County
fields.tooltip: Specifies the state, province or county as a part of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Bal. Account Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the balancing account type used in the credit memo line.
The program copies the balancing account type from the Bal. Account Type field on the sales header.
You cannot change the type because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of exit through which you shipped the items out of your country/region.
The program copies the code from the Exit Point field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry was posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Document Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the related document was created.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the external document number that is entered on the sales header that this line was posted from.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used in the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Area field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the transaction specification that was used in the credit memo.
The program copies the code from the Transaction Specification field on the sales header.
You cannot change the code because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's method of payment. The program has copied the code from the Payment Method Code field on the sales header.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent is used to transport the items on the sales document to the customer.

fields.name: Package Tracking No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping agent's package number.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the credit memo from which the posted credit memo was created.
The program automatically copies this field from the No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the pre-assigned number series because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted credit memo.
The program automatically copies this field from the Posting No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number series because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Pre-Assigned No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the credit memo that the posted credit memo was created from.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the user who posted the credit memo.
You cannot change the user ID because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the source code that is linked to the sales credit memo header.
The program copies the source code from either the Sales field or the Deleted Document field in the Source Code Setup table.
You cannot change the source code because the entry has been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the tax area that is used to calculate and post sales tax.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the customer or vendor is liable for sales tax.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the code from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field on the sales header.

fields.name: VAT Base Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the percentage to use to discount the VAT element if a payment discount is to be posted. The value is validated against the maximum possible VAT Tolerance % field value in the General Ledger Setup. The maximum value cannot be overridden with the exception of a credit note where you can manually enter the value used for the payment discount.

fields.name: Prepmt. Cr. Memo No. Series
fields.tooltip:
Contains the code for the number series that was used to assign a number to the posted prepayment credit memo if the credit memo is a prepayment credit memo.
The program automatically copies this field from the Prepayment No. Series field on the sales header.
You cannot change the number series because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Prepayment Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the credit memo is a prepayment credit memo.

fields.name: Prepayment Order No.
fields.tooltip:
Contains the number of the sales order from which this prepayment credit memo was posted if the credit memo is a prepayment credit memo.
You cannot change the order number because the credit memo has already been posted.

fields.name: Company Bank Account Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bank account to use for bank information when the document is printed.

fields.name: VAT Reporting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the VAT date on the invoice.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Document Exchange Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the document if you are using a document exchange service to send it as an electronic document. The status values are reported by the document exchange service.

fields.name: Paid
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice that relates to this sales credit memo is paid.

fields.name: Remaining Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that remains to be paid for the posted sales invoice.

fields.name: Cust. Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Used to determine if the posted sales invoice that relates to this sales credit memo is paid.
The state is shown in the Paid field on the posted sales invoice.

fields.name: Invoice Discount Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the amount that is calculated and shown in the Invoice Discount Amount field at the bottom of posted sales invoices. The amount is deducted from the value in the Total Incl. VAT field.
If you have set up invoice discounts for the customer, then the specified percentage value is automatically inserted in the Customer Invoice Discount % field if the criteria are met. The calculated discount amount is inserted in the Invoice Discount Amount field, but you can change it manually. For more information, see How to: Set Up Invoice Discount Terms.

fields.name: Cancelled
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice that relates to this sales credit memo has been either corrected or canceled.

fields.name: Corrective
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the posted sales invoice has been either corrected or canceled by this sales credit memo.

fields.name: Campaign No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the campaign that the document is linked to.

fields.name: Sell-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the customer who handles the credit memo.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact at the customer who handles the credit memo.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves the customer on this sales document.

fields.name: Shipping Agent Service Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which shipping agent service is used to transport the items on the sales document to the customer.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the sales return order that the sales credit memo is related to.

fields.name: Return Order No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that was used to assign a number to the sales return order that the sales credit memo is related to.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.

fields.name: Get Return Receipt Used
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.
